review_queue.review_goal: Determine whether this OCR-quality-flagged file contains usable medical data or whether the OCR safety gate correctly deferred it.
review_queue.operator_question: Open the file. Is it a real medical document (lab results, medication, radiology, clinical note)? Was the OCR quality gate correct to flag it?
review_queue.development_impact: Resolves operator_feedback_completion open branch. Directly informs manual_review_package_improvement and document_class_classifier_improvement open branches.

review_queue.review_goal: Determine whether OCR quality is genuinely marginal or whether the document is structurally unusual — informs manual-review-package improvement.
review_queue.operator_question: Open the file. Is it readable? Does it contain medical data? Should this have been accepted or kept in review?
review_queue.development_impact: Resolves operator_feedback_completion open branch. Directly informs manual_review_package_improvement and document_class_classifier_improvement open branches.

review_queue.review_goal: Validation system flagged this file as requiring human review. Confirm whether the routing decision was correct.
review_queue.operator_question: Open the file. Does it contain medical data? Was the system correct to route this to review rather than accept or empty?
review_queue.development_impact: Resolves operator_feedback_completion open branch. Directly informs manual_review_package_improvement and document_class_classifier_improvement open branches.

review_queue.review_goal: Determine the true document class and whether the system routing was correct. Informs document-class classifier improvement.
review_queue.operator_question: Open the file. What kind of document is it? (Lab report / radiology / medication / admin / other non-medical)
review_queue.development_impact: Informs document_class_classifier_improvement open branch. Helps resolve operator_feedback_completion backlog.
